name: llm-provider-mcp
description: Delegate asynchronous coding jobs between Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, and Pi.
long_description: A local MCP server that launches coding-agent jobs in detached tmux sessions, returns a job ID immediately, and lets the host poll progress or collect the final result.

tools.name: list_coding_agents
tools.description: List enabled local coding-agent targets and capabilities.

tools.name: list_coding_agent_models
tools.description: Discover curated model selectors for a coding-agent target.

tools.name: delegate_coding_agent
tools.description: Start an asynchronous coding task and return a durable job ID.

tools.name: get_coding_agent_job
tools.description: Read job progress, terminal output, or the final result.

tools.name: cancel_coding_agent_job
tools.description: Cancel a queued or running coding-agent job.
